entity.label: Joseph (son of Asaph)
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: One of the sons of Asaph, head of the first division of sacred musicians (1 Chr. 25:2, 9).

nodes.label: Joseph (son of Asaph)
nodes.description: One of the sons of Asaph, head of the first division of sacred musicians (1 Chr. 25:2, 9).

nodes.label: Asaph (Levite)
nodes.description: A Levite; one of the leaders of David’s choir (1 Chr. 6:39). Psalms 50 and 73-83 inclusive are attributed to him. He is mentioned along with David as skilled in music, and a “seer” (2 Chr. 29:30). The “sons of Asaph,” mentioned in 1 Chr. 25:1, 2 Chr. 20:14, and Ezra 2:41, were his descendants, or more probably a class of poets or singers who recognized him as their master.

nodes.label: Jesharelah
nodes.description: Upright towards God, the head of the seventh division of Levitical musicians (1 Chr. 25:14).

nodes.label: Zaccur
nodes.description: A son of Asaph, and chief of one of the courses of singers as arranged by David (1 Chr. 25:2, 10).

verses.text: Of the sons of Asaph; Zaccur, and Joseph, and Nethaniah, and Asarelah, the sons of Asaph under the hands of Asaph, which prophesied according to the order of the king.
Now the first lot came forth for Asaph to Joseph: the second to Gedaliah, who with his brethren and sons were twelve:
